summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EmergentPulse AI platform - Backend API, Frontend UI, and integrations tested. Critical LLM integration issues identified blocking AI features.

critical_bugs.issue: Embedding generation fails - Invalid model 'text-embedding-3-small' for Emergent LLM service
critical_bugs.impact: Knowledge base creation completely blocked - users cannot add knowledge
critical_bugs.error_details: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Error code: 400 - Invalid model name

critical_bugs.issue: AI chat responses fail due to embedding service issues
Widget chat messages fail - same embedding model issue
critical_bugs.impact: Deployed AI widgets completely non-functional for end users

working_endpoints.status: ✅ Working - Authentication working with provided session token

integration_issues.issue: Knowledge form submissions fail silently due to backend embedding issues
Sandbox chat shows user messages but AI responses fail due to backend LLM issues

working_features: Landing page loads perfectly with hero, features, and how-it-works sections
Dashboard authentication and navigation works correctly
Project detail page with all 7 tabs (Knowledge, Golden Rules, Test Bot, Deploy, Analytics, Leads, Feedback) render correctly
Chat interface UI elements work (input field, message display)

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections (hero, features, how-it-works)
Project detail page with all 7 tabs
Basic API endpoints (root, auth, projects, analytics, leads, feedback)
Chat interface rendering and user message display

success_percentage.backend: 77% (10/13 endpoints working - 3 critical LLM-related endpoints failing)
success_percentage.frontend: 90% (All UI components working, 2 integration flows blocked by backend issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix embedding model compatibility issue. The Emergent LLM service does not support 'text-embedding-3-small' model. Need to either: 1) Update to supported embedding model, or 2) Fix Emergent LLM service configuration. This blocks all AI functionality including knowledge base creation, chat responses, and widget deployment. Check available models via /v1/models endpoint and update backend code accordingly.
